declared_source_universe: All locally cached evaluable THEMIS encounters from live-mode CDAWeb-fetched runs
actually_searched_universe: All runs/*/encounter_*.json, deduplicated by date+probe, filtered to evaluable with Dn>0
source_filter_used: Exclude encounters where dp=2.0 AND bz=2.0 AND ma=8.0 AND sza=0.0 (synthetic fixture signature)
